## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the contributing guidelines.
- [ ] My code follows the project's coding conventions.
- [ ] I have added Pester tests for my changes.
- [ ] All existing tests pass.
- [ ] For tweaks: the function supports `-WhatIf` and `-Confirm`.
- [ ] For tweaks: if security-related, `DANGEROUS: true` is set in the metadata block.
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation (schemas, CLI spec) if needed.
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`.
